live.label: live ready after typing
live.title: Live mock · Technical Interview
live.transcript:
tice 5 - Poisson Distribution and Poisson Paradigm #11. Raindrops are falling at an average rate of 20 drops per square inch per minute.
What would be a reasonable distribution to use for the number of raindrops
hitting a particular region measuring 5 inches2 in t minutes? Why? Using your
chosen distribution, compute the probability that the region has no rain drops
in a given 3 second time interval.AI interviewerStart your answer. Walk me through your thinking; I will ask follow-ups from there.
